description: Periodically place a marker zone at your feet. Enemies entering the zone are marked, taking bonus damage from all sources for several seconds.
tooltipTemplate: Place a marker zone every {trap.placeInterval:1}s ({trap.radius} radius, lasts {trap.durationSeconds:1}s). Marked enemies take {trap.markMultiplier%} bonus damage from all sources for {trap.markDuration:1}s.
